name: Baba Yaga's Hut

visual_attributes.morphology: A small wooden hut elevated on chicken legs
visual_attributes.texture: Rough, wooden texture with natural imperfections
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: Approximately the size of a small cottage
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Elevated on two or more chicken legs, with a door and windows

domain_specific_functional.narrative_role: Acts as a threshold between worlds
domain_specific_functional.cultural_symbolism: Represents the boundary between the known and the unknown

relationships.description: The hut serves as the home of Baba Yaga, a witch from Slavic folklore.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents the mystical and unpredictable nature of the forest and its inhabitants

contrastive_constraints: NOT a modern or contemporary house
